serverInfo.name: qc-validator-mcp
serverInfo.description: Runtime quality validation for AI agent outputs — hallucination detection, scope compliance checks, and output quality scoring
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: validate_output
tools.description: Score agent output quality against configurable criteria — length, keywords, forbidden patterns, claim density

tools.name: check_hallucination_risk
tools.description: Estimate hallucination likelihood with source-grounded or heuristic analysis

tools.name: check_scope_compliance
tools.description: Validate output against a scope contract — allowed/forbidden topics, word limits, required sections

tools.name: log_validation
tools.description: Store validation results for per-agent trending and failure pattern analysis

tools.name: get_failure_patterns
tools.description: Analyze common failure modes for a specific agent with pass rate, trends, and top issues

tools.name: generate_quality_report
tools.description: Quality dashboard for all agents — pass rates, worst/best performers, recommendations

resources.description: Quality metrics dashboard for all validated agents

pricing.enterprise: $499/month — SSO, audit logs, custom validation rules, SLA
